attributes.name: Beginner 3 (Beta) - Saturday 11:15am
attributes.description: Class Time: 11:15am - 11:45amPractice/Free time: 11:45 - 12:15pm Beginner 3/Beta Third beginning level skating class for ages 6-17Prerequisite : Beginner 2/Alpha Class Curriculum: Backward Crossovers right over left. Backward Crossovers left over right. Backward Stroking. Right T-Stop. Left T-Stop. There are no refunds, make ups or credits for missed classes.
